suite.name: Signature Persistence

kw.name: Setup Test Run Directory
Verify Test Environment
File Should Exist
kw.arg: msg=ank-server binary not found. Run: cargo build --release --target ${ANKAIOS_TARGET} -p ank-server
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.arg: msg=ank-agent binary not found. Run: cargo build --release --target ${ANKAIOS_TARGET} -p ank-agent
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.arg: msg=ank binary not found. Run: cargo build --release --target ${ANKAIOS_TARGET} -p ank
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.arg: msg=Persistence plugin image not found. Run: podman build -t localhost/ank-persist:test -f examples/plugins/basic_persistency/Containerfile .
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.arg: msg=Fleet connector image not found. Run: podman build -t localhost/fleet-connector:test -f tools/tutorials/fleet_management/fleet-connector/Dockerfile tools/tutorials/fleet_management/fleet-connector
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: ✅ Test environment verified: all binaries and images found
kw.arg: ✅ Test environment verified: all binaries and images found
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Verify that all required binaries and images exist before running tests

kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.doc: Splits the ``string`` using ``separator`` as a delimiter string.

test.name: Signed Manifest Is Persisted With Signature Block

kw.name: Generate Ed25519 Keypair
Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given path (file or directory) exists.

kw.name: Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given path (file or directory) exists.

kw.msg: Generated keypair: test-key-001 using ank keygen

kw.name: Copy File
kw.doc: Copies the source file into the destination.

kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Create Startup Manifest With Persistence Plugin
Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.msg: ${manifest} = apiVersion: v1 workloads: basic_persistency: runtime: podman agent: agent_A runtimeConfig: | image: localhost/ank-persist:test commandOptions: ["-v", "/tmp/ankaios-test-17795...
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.name: Create File
kw.doc: Creates a file with the given content and encoding.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Created startup manifest with persistence plugin container using test dir: /tmp/ankaios-test-1779552947-3737
kw.arg: Created startup manifest with persistence plugin container using test dir: ${test_dir}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Create startup manifest that includes persistence plugin as workload

kw.arg: Create Startup Manifest With Persistence Plugin
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Sign Startup Manifest

kw.doc: Wrapper for `List Directory` that returns only files.

kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.msg: ${config} = version = "v1" startup_manifest = "/tmp/ankaios-test-1779552947-3737/startup.pb" [signature_verification] enabled = true require_signature = true keys_directory = "/tmp/ankaios-test-1779552947-3737/ke...
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.name: Create File
kw.doc: Creates a file with the given content and encoding.

kw.name: Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Is Process Running
kw.doc: Checks is the process running or not.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Log
kw.msg: ERROR: Server process exited immediately - check /tmp/ankaios-test-1779552947-3737/ankaios-server.log
kw.arg: ERROR: Server process exited immediately - check ${server_log}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.arg: ERROR: Server process exited immediately - check ${server_log}
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Log File
kw.msg: [2026-05-23T16:15:47Z INFO common::config] Loading config from user provided path '/tmp/ankaios-test-1779552947-3737/ank-server.conf' [2026-05-23T16:15:47Z INFO ank_server::signature_validator] Loaded Ed25519 public key: test-key-001.pem [2026-05-23T16:15:47Z INFO ank_server] ✅ Signature verification enabled [2026-05-23T16:15:47Z ERROR ank_server] ❌ Startup manifest signature verification failed: GenericVerificationFailure
kw.doc: Wrapper for `Get File` that also logs the returned file.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Fail
kw.msg: Server failed to start - see log above
kw.arg: Server failed to start - see log above
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.arg: Server failed to start - see log above
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.
kw.status: Server failed to start - see log above

kw.name: Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.arg: reason=Wait for agent to connect and register
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.arg: Wait For Persistence Plugin To Be Ready

kw.arg: Ankaios server and agent started with signature_verification=${signature_verification_enabled}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.status: Server failed to start - see log above

kw.name: Apply Manifest
kw.doc: Apply manifest via ank CLI. Fails only on actual apply errors (signature/policy), not on workload state timeouts.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.arg: reason=Wait for workload to reach Running state and persist
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.arg: msg=Workload file should exist in workloads directory
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: Get File
kw.doc: Returns the contents of a specified file.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: msg=Workload file must contain signature separator
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: msg=Workload file must contain signature field
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: msg=Workload file must contain correct key_id
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: msg=Workload file must contain correct counter
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Verify Manifest Signature
kw.doc: Verify Ed25519 signature on manifest using ank verify

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.arg: msg=Persisted workload file signature must be valid
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: ✅ SUCCESS: Persistence file contains valid signature
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

Stop Ankaios Server
Terminate Process
kw.doc: Stops the process gracefully or forcefully.

test.doc: Verify that persistence plugin saves signed YAML with signature intact
test.status:
Server failed to start - see log above
Also teardown failed: Non-existing index or alias 'ankaios-agent'.

suite.doc: End-to-end tests for signature preservation through persistence plugin

errors.msg: ERROR: Server process exited immediately - check /tmp/ankaios-test-1779552947-3737/ankaios-server.log
